title: How a Godly Man Finishes What He Doesn't Feel Like Finishing
caption:
Motivation is a mood. Finishing is a decision.

A godly man doesn't wait to feel like it. He starts anyway, does the boring last stretch, does it right when no one's grading him, and lets the work outlast the mood.

That's not hustle. That's what it looks like when Christ has hold of a man's discipline.

#faith #discipline #christianman #workethic #godlyman #menofgod
